name: flare-setup-bot
description: Discord setup bot that bootstraps and maintains the Flare HQ server

scripts.stop: orb run -m aisquad -u root systemctl stop openclaw-sentinel
scripts.restart: orb run -m aisquad -u root systemctl restart openclaw-sentinel
scripts.logs: orb run -m aisquad -u root journalctl -u openclaw-sentinel --no-pager -n 50 -f

author: Filipe Fernandes
